result.stdout:
*** CIL Browser 0.3.0.0 ***
Copyright (c) 2023, MSDN.WhiteKnight (https://github.com/MSDN-WhiteKnight/CilBrowser)


Command line syntax:
  CilBrowser [Options] <InputPath>

Options:
--output: Output directory
--namespace: Namespace filter
--footer: Custom footer file path
--host: URL host (default is http://localhost:8080)
--prefix: URL prefix (default is /CilBrowser/)

Examples:
  CilBrowser MyLibrary.dll
Open website for MyLibrary.dll in server mode
  CilBrowser --output C:\Websites\MyLibrary MyLibrary.dll
Generate static website for MyLibrary.dll in the output directory
  CilBrowser --output C:\Websites\MyProject C:\repos\MyProject
Generate static website for MyProject sources in the output directory
